Meta.homeDescription: I automate what slows you down. AI-powered automations, bots and integrations for SMEs and founders — delivered in days, not months. Based in Lausanne, Switzerland.
Meta.servicesDescription: From a one-off Python script to a full AI workforce: automations, API integrations, Telegram & Discord bots, web scraping and modern web apps. Delivered in days.
Meta.contactTitle: Contact — Book a free call | NeuroDevLab
Meta.contactDescription: Book a free 30-minute call or send a message. AI automation for SMEs and founders across Switzerland and Europe. Usually responds within 2 hours.
Meta.ogTagline: AI automations, bots & integrations — delivered in days, not months.

Contact.title: Book a call or send a message
Contact.subtitle: Pick a slot that suits you — or write a few lines and I'll reply within ~2 hours.
Contact.calendlyOpen: Open the calendar in a new tab
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messagePlaceholder: What would you like to automate?
Contact.success: Thanks! Your message is on its way — I'll get back to you within ~2 hours.
Contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or book a call instead.
Contact.rateLimited: Too many messages from this address. Please try again later or book a call.

ServicesPage.title: Automation, end to end
ServicesPage.subtitle: One developer, one AI workforce. I scope it on a call, build it in days, and hand you something that just runs.

automations.title: AI Automations
automations.long: Workflows that connect your apps and do the boring work for you — every hour, every day, without anyone clicking a button.
automations.outcome: Hours of manual work removed every week.

integrations.title: API Integrations
integrations.long: Stripe, Shopify, Notion, HubSpot, Google — I wire your tools together so data flows automatically instead of being copy-pasted.
integrations.outcome: One source of truth, zero double entry.

bots.title: Telegram & Discord Bots
bots.long: Bots that answer customers, send notifications and run commands — available 24/7 with the exact logic your business needs.

scraping.title: Web Scraping & Data
scraping.long: Collect, clean and structure data from any website on a schedule, delivered straight to your sheet, database or dashboard.

scripts.title: Python Scripts & Automation
scripts.long: Tailor-made scripts that eliminate a specific repetitive task — reports, file processing, reconciliations, batch jobs.
scripts.outcome: The task you dread, done in seconds.

webapps.title: Modern Web Apps
webapps.long: Fast, accessible web apps built with Next.js and React — dashboards, internal tools and customer-facing products.
webapps.outcome: A product that loads instantly and scales.

ServicesPage.processSubtitle: Simple, fast, and built to run without you.
ServicesPage.step1Desc: We map what slows you down and pick the highest-impact workflow to automate first.
ServicesPage.step2Desc: I build, test and document it — you get progress updates the whole way.
ServicesPage.step3Desc: It ships, it runs, and you see exactly how much time and money it saves.

ExitIntent.title: Before you go
ExitIntent.message: Book a free call to see if we're a good fit — no pitch, no pressure.
